title: erepsia coralliflora
intro: Erepsia coralliflora, also known as the coral erepsis or coral lips, is a flowering plant species in the family Scrophulariaceae, characterized by its bright red, tubular flowers. Traditionally, Erepsia coralliflora has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to help relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. Erepsia coralliflora can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and its dried flowers are often used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
